violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food stored on the freezer floor.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw ground beef patties were touching raw pork chops in the meat department display case.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The open air cooler with dips and containers of soup was not holding a temperature of 41 degrees or less.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of lids on the floor by the stairs and several boxes of single use items stored on the floor in the upstairs dry storage.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
